subject: [PATCH 01/14] nfsd: move struct nfsd_genl_rqstp to nfsctl.c

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch moves the definition of the 'struct nfsd_genl_rqstp' from the nfsd.h header file to the nfsctl.c source file, where it is used. This change simplifies the code by removing redundant definitions and makes it easier to manage dependencies between files.
